nodes.title: Display Business Cards
nodes.description: When user navigates to /businesses, fetch GET /api/businesses and display each business as a card with name, description, icon. Success: show cards. Empty: show empty state. Failure: show error message.

nodes.title: Navigate To Business On Click
nodes.description: When user clicks a business card, set current business in BusinessService and navigate to /biz/:bizId (dashboard). URL updates. Sidebar loads for that business.
